text:
The Budapest Times

The most popular events to be watched by Hungarian fans include handball, water polo and canoe-kayak, Peter Szijjarto said, according to a ministry statement.

“To have this many Hungarian athletes, their escorts, and Hungarian fans present at the same venue at the same time, gives us … a special task,” he said, noting that seven consuls would be on duty in Paris and another two in Lyon.

There are 180 Hungarian athletes competing in 21 events of the Games, said Szijjarto.
